message:
feat(multi): write witness SSI, precompiled program reuse, CAMP morsel optimization

Cross-cutting improvements spanning SSI infrastructure, query execution,
and vectorized dispatch:

Write Witness SSI (cursor.rs, pager.rs, traits.rs, glossary.rs):
- Add record_write_witness() to PageWriter trait and TransactionHandle
  for fine-grained Serializable Snapshot Isolation bookkeeping
- Implement on TransactionPageIo (delegates to txn), MemPageStore (no-op),
  pager (no-op stub), and MockTransaction
- Rewrite WitnessKey::page_number() as const fn with btree_root bucketing:
  Cell and KeyRange witnesses now map to btree_root instead of leaf_page,
  enabling O(1) page/root-level witness indexes

Precompiled Program Reuse (connection.rs):
- Refactor SELECT, UPDATE, and DELETE execution paths to accept optional
  precompiled VdbeProgram references via Arc<Statement>
- Eliminates redundant recompilation when the same query is executed
  repeatedly within a transaction by routing through compile_with_cache
  only when no precompiled program is supplied

VDBE + Dispatch (engine.rs, vectorized_dispatch.rs):
- Fix borrow checker issue in InsertInt opcode: clone record_val before
  consuming to prevent use-after-move
- Add Content-Aware Morsel Partitioning (CAMP) pre-allocation in
  partition_page_morsels() — pre-calculates total morsels to eliminate
  vector re-allocations; use direct PageMorsel struct construction
  as fast-path bypassing redundant validation

WAL FEC (wal_fec.rs):
- Fix drain_abandoned_work() receiver borrow direction: callers pass
  &mut receiver while the function signature takes shared &receiver,
  aligning mutability with actual usage pattern

Workspace (Cargo.toml):
- Add fsqlite-e2e crate to workspace members
- Remove force-frame-pointers from release profile

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ members = [
     "crates/fsqlite-ext-icu",
     "crates/fsqlite-ext-misc",
     "crates/fsqlite-core",
+    "crates/fsqlite-e2e",
     "crates/fsqlite",
     "crates/fsqlite-cli",
     "crates/fsqlite-harness",
@@ -178,7 +179,6 @@ codegen-units = 1
 panic = "abort"
 strip = false
 debug = true
-force-frame-pointers = true
 
 [profile.release-perf]
 inherits = "release"
